option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Image người thuê -->
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imgTenant" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Ảnh người thuê" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/ic_person" /> <!-- Button chọn ảnh --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnChooseImage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Chọn ảnh" android:backgroundTint="@color/blue" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginTop="8dp"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/edtName" android:hint="Tên người thuê" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPersonName"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/edtGender" android:hint="Giới tính" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/edtPhone" android:hint="Số điện thoại" android:inputType="phone" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"/> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Image người thuê -->
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imgTenant" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Ảnh người thuê" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/ic_person" /> <!-- Button chọn ảnh --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnChooseImage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Chọn ảnh" android:backgroundTint="@color/blue" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginTop="8dp"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/edtName" android:hint="Tên người thuê" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textPersonName"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/edtGender" android:hint="Giới tính" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text"/>
<EditText android:id="@+id/edtPhone" android:hint="Số điện thoại" android:inputType="phone" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content"/> </LinearLayout>
